00:17:26	Barnabas:	I think we would have a good solid chance to have devnet 7 to be our final devnet btw
00:17:40	Toni Wahrstätter:	imo, the strongest argument is that it keeps on-chain proofs against the beacon root stable.
The fact that it allows us avoiding bumping some constants (e.g. 8192 deposits) is a less strong argument.
00:18:15	Toni Wahrstätter:	how long will including this EIP delay things for those clients that don't have it yet?
00:18:26	Dustin:	Toni: I agree actually, that the stability is the stonger point longer-term
